settings.title: Cancel before painting begins
settings.body: Before the artist starts, the order can be canceled for a full refund.

settings.title: Free revisions before shipping
settings.body: Reasonable refinements are included while the final artwork is still being reviewed.

settings.title: 30-day protection for damage or defects
settings.body: If the artwork arrives damaged or clearly defective, contact us within 30 days of delivery.

settings.title: Full refund before the artist starts.
settings.paragraph_1: You may cancel your order for a full refund before your artist starts working on the painting.
settings.paragraph_2: Once the artist has started, the order is considered in production and can no longer be cancelled for a full refund.

settings.title: Refine the details while the piece is still in progress.
settings.paragraph_1: We offer free revisions before your painting is shipped.
settings.paragraph_2: If we share a preview before shipping, you may request reasonable adjustments to help the artwork better match your original photo and order request.
settings.paragraph_3: This may include details such as facial features, colors, background, or other small refinements.
settings.paragraph_4: Major changes outside the original order request may require additional time and may not always be possible.

settings.title: A separate resolution path for verified issues.
settings.paragraph_1: If your painting arrives damaged or has a clear production defect, please contact us within 30 days of delivery.
settings.paragraph_2: After reviewing the issue, we may offer a replacement, repair, or refund depending on the situation.
settings.paragraph_3: Please include your order number and clear photos of the issue. If the package was damaged during shipping, please also include photos of the packaging.

settings.note: Each painting is handmade, so small variations in brushwork, texture, and artistic interpretation are part of the custom artwork process. These natural differences are not considered defects.
Color may also appear slightly different in person than on a screen due to display settings and lighting conditions.
